meaning: n.[希神]赫楞(相传为希腊人的祖先)
examples: He and Hellen got married last year.
Hellen buried her face in the crook of her arm.
In other events, Hellen Obiri of Kenya won the women's 1, 500 in 3:58.58, and Ethiopian Tirunesh Dibaba took the 5, 000 in 14:42.01.
Her all-woman band, Hellen, has played at almost every club in Detroit since she and four friends taught themselves to play five years ago.
